item.title: Beginner eyeshadow hacks for a polished look
item.description: A few tiny swaps can make your eye makeup feel like a glow-up. Try these beginner-friendly eyeshadow hacks for a more polished finish.

item.title: Conceal Under-Eye Bags and Dark Circles
item.description: Learn how to conceal under-eye bags and dark circles for a smoother look. This makeup tutorial shares simple concealer tips for a brightened under-eye area.

item.title: DIY Hair Shine Mask for Silky Hair

item.title: Perfect Smokey Wing in a Few Steps

item.title: Simple Smokey Cat Eye Lift Tutorial
item.description: Learn how to create a simple smokey cat eye with a lifted finish. The blend is easy, and the lift is the part you’ll want to copy.
